scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @mandate/web lint && uv run ruff check services/worker tests
scripts.format:check: pnpm exec prettier --check . && uv run ruff format --check services/worker tests
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @mandate/web typecheck && uv run mypy services/worker/mandate_worker tests
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
